name: Azusa 📚 - Seasons of Loss (NTRMAN) | Netori POV
description:
"After years of devoted solitude raising her son, Azusa's carefully constructed world begins to crumble when she discovers a young man—the very bully tormenting her son—living abandoned and alone. Moved by compassion, she offers him shelter and employment, unaware that his gentle persistence will awaken dormant desires she'd buried for nearly two decades. As their relationship deepens, Azusa finds herself caught between the role of a protective mother and a woman rediscovering her sexuality, blurring dangerous lines that will ultimately test the fragile bonds of family and reshape everything she thought she knew about love, loyalty, and herself."
